ogTitle: Mumbulla Mountain vs Mummel: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mumbulla Mountain and Mummel.
heading: Mumbulla Mountain vs Mummel — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mumbulla Mountain, New South Wales and Mummel, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mummel has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Mumbulla Mountain (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mumbulla Mountain or Mummel safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mumbulla Mountain has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Mummel scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mumbulla Mountain scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Mummel scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mumbulla Mountain or Mummel?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mummel has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.07% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
